description_long: This is a futuristic, streamlined airplane with a blended wing body design, featuring a wide, delta-shaped wing that smoothly integrates into the fuselage. The surface is predominantly metallic gray with stylized markings, including the word 'WATSHUTTLE' and a yellow emblem on the sides. Two large, cylindrical jet engines are mounted at the rear, flanked by small, upward-pointing vertical stabilizers. The nose is sharply pointed and painted black, while the cockpit is positioned at the front, with a subtle canopy outline visible. The overall appearance suggests a high-speed, advanced aircraft, possibly designed for rapid urban or intercity transport.
description: A sleek, delta-wing airplane with a metallic gray finish, rear twin jet engines, and a pointed black nose. Markings and a streamlined design give it a futuristic, high-speed look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, delta-shaped wings, pointed nose, and the twin jet engine intakes at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the smooth, aerodynamic fuselage, rear-mounted engines, and visible yellow emblem near the nose.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin jet exhausts, upward-pointing stabilizers, and the full width of the blended wing body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the 'WATSHUTTLE' marking, engine placement, and the overall streamlined profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, blended delta wing with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles; wings are smoothly integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted and integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers mounted at the rear, upward-pointing, with no conventional horizontal stabilizer visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined canopy integrated into the nose section.
